snippet.title: Copper and Gold double-header ft Freeport's Adkerson and Barrick's Bristow | TNM Podcast 328
snippet.description:
This week’s episode is a copper and gold CEO double-header, featuring the opening remarks of Freeport-McMoran CEO Richard Adkerson at the company’s recent Q4 conference call on Jan. 25, 2023, as well an interview with Barrick Gold CEO Mark Bristow at the Future Minerals Forum in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Both CEOs emphasize the strategic importance of copper to their long-term vision and its central role in the green energy transformation.

All this and more with host Adrian Pocobelli.

“Rattlesnake Railroad”, “Big Western Sky”, “Western Adventure” and “Battle on the Western Frontier” by Brett Van Donsel (www.incompetech.com).

Licensed under Creative Commons: By Attribution 4.0 License
creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

snippet.title: Higher Copper Prices Will Trigger New Mines, Freeport CEO Says
snippet.description:
The world will not run out of copper and the price of the metal will rise. That is the view of Richard Adkerson, the CEO of Freeport-McMoRan. He spoke to Bloomberg's Alix Steel at the CERAWeek conference in Houston on the strong global demand for copper. 
 --------

snippet.title: 2023 Internship Project Presentation at Freeport-McMoRan
snippet.description:
Kali ini kita share konten keilmuan dulu ya, biar agak bermanfaat sedikit channel Youtube ini juga hehehe.

Ini adalah video saya saat presentasi project yang saya kerjakan selama menjalani Summer Internship di salah satu perusahaan tambang besar di Amerika. Yes, tidak lain dan tidak bukan Freeport McMoRan. Walaupun mungkin teman-teman tidak terlalu familiar dengan ilmu pertambangan, tapi semoga video ini tetap dapat memberikan manfaat untuk kita semua ya.

Jangan lupa subscribe, like and share ya kalau suka, biar enggak ketinggalan konten-konten selanjutnya. Thank you!
